titleStmt.title: SII 8.243: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 243. (A.R. No. 639 of 1902). ON THE EAST AND NORTH WALLS OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Irupattoṉṟāvatu mitunanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tuvāda ciyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa coti ṉāḷ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻkūṟṟu Amparnāṭṭuk koṟṟavācalil tillaināyakaṉ toṇṭaimāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ puvaṉekavīra Akaḷaṅkanāṭāḻvār Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻkūṟṟu Amparnāṭṭu Eṇṇukuṭiyil neṭuvāyiluṭaiyār tevarka
ṇṭapperumāḷpakkal koṇṭuṭaiyatāṉa tiruvekampamayakkal Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku melpārkkellai Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai vitāṉattukkum Āṟkāṭukiḻār nilattukkum teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai vaḻivarampukkum paḷḷattukkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai nāyanār vīṟṟiruṉtaperumāḷtiruviḷaiyāṭṭattukku vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam va Innilam kālum cantiracekaramayakka leṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku melpāṟkellai mutali
yār tirunāmattukkāṇikkum Āṟkāṭukiḻār nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai maṇaṟkuṉṟukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai Āṟkāṭukiḻār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai mukkālvāykkālukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam �6 Innilam nāṉmā varaiyum mukkāṟkaṇṭa meṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku melpāṟkellai Āṟkāṭukiḻār nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai mukkālvā
ykkālukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai vaḻivarampukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai virarācentiracoḻapperāṟṟukku vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam � Innilam nālumāvum kaḷḷiccey yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku melpāṟkellai vaḻivarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tevatāṉattukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai Innāyiṉār tevatāṉattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyār nilattukkuvaṭa
kkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam 2 pama Innilam Iraṇṭumāk kāṇiyum Āka nilam n=tatma Innilam mukkāle mukkāṇiyum nattattiṟ koṇṭa virarācentiracoḻapperāṟṟukkut teṟkup peruñārkiḻavar maṉai yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa maṉaikku melpāṟkellai nāyiṉār tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār tevatāṉattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellaiyum kiḻpāṟkellaiyum teṉpāṟkellaiyum viṟkiṉṟārmaṉaikkut teṟkum meṟkum vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaikkuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa maṉai kuḻi 4 10 I
kkuḻi nāṟpatum Āka maṉai kuḻi 4 10 viḷai nilam n ta� Immaṉai kuḻi nāṟpatum viḷainilam mukkāle mukkāṇiyum ciṉṉamum Ivarpakkal koṇṭa koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcivallavatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5vatu Irupattañcāvatu vṛścika nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa ttu paurṇai yum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rocaṇi nāḷ tuṇṭam Atticcey yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku teṉpāṟkellai Ammaiappaṉvāykkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāmattukkāṇikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke
llai pāṇṭikulapatipperāṟṟukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai mutaliyār tirunāmattukkāṇikku meṟkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam vama Innilam kāle kāṇiyum virarācentiracoḻapperāṟṟukkut teṟku muḷḷikkāleṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellaiyum vaṭapāṟkellaiyum koḷkiṉṟāṉ ṉilattukku meṟkum teṟkum melpāṟkellaiyum teṉpāṟkellaiyum kūṟṟaṅkuṭivāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭakkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam va Innilam
kālum muṉṟunāṭṭāṉpaṭukai yeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyāṉ tiruviṭaimarutūruṭaiyārum tiruppāmpuramuṭaiyār tevatāṉap paṭukaikkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai virarācentiracoḻapperāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Iṟaivāṉceri Ellaikkulaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pāṇṭikulapatipperāṟṟukkut teṟkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa paṭukai kuḻi 3 100 Ikkuḻi muṉṉūṟum Āka viḷainilam Araiye kāṇiyum paṭukai kuḻi muṉṉūṟum Āka viḷainilam kavapa maṉai kuḻi 4 10 paṭukai
� 3 100 Inta viḷainilam Oṉṟe Āṟumāvum maṉai kuḻi nāṟpatum paṭukai kuḻi muṉṉūṟum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkāciṉāl puvaṉekaviraṉ � 8 10 3- m Ākavarāmaṉ � 5 10 1- m Āka � 100 3 10 4 Ippaṇam nūṟṟu muppatunālum Akaḷaṅkattaṭṭāṉum tiruvāykkulattuppiḷḷaiyum kāṭciyākap poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyāṉ puvaṉekavira vakaḷaṅkanāṭāḻvāṟku neṭuvāyaluṭaiyāṉ tevarkaṇṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭikku Ivai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyāṉ
tevarkaṇṭapperumāḷ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai neṭuvāyaluṭaiyāṉ tiruviṭaimarutūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ puṟakkuṭaiyāreṉ . Ippaṭikku Aṟiveṉ putuccerikkuṭaiyāṉ Ampalapperumāḷeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirunallūruṭaiyāreṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirumikaiccūruṭaiyār koyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇariṟ cellappiḷḷaiyāṉ taṟkuṟiyāṉamaikku Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 8.243 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
